---
title: "Aaron Lohmann"
image: aaronlohmann_foto.jpg
image-alt: "Portrait photo of the author with a transparent background"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: github
      href: https://github.com/aaron-lohmann
    - text: bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/aaron-lohmann.bsky.social
comments: false
title-block-banner: true
---

<div>


I'm Aaron, an economics PhD candidate at [IfW Kiel](https://www.kielinstitut.de) and [Bielefeld University](https://www.uni-bielefeld.de). My research focuses on the intersection of international trade, innovation, and digital technologies.

Download my CV here: [Download CV](CV.pdf)

</div>
